body:
### GitHubTags
#A11ySev2; #A11yTCS;#DesktopWeb; #Win32;#.NET Project system for CSharp and VB;#BM_AspireDashboard_Web_June25;#Win32;#WCAG2.1.1;#Keyboard;#A11yMAS;

### Environment Details:
Application Name: Aspire Dashboard
Edition Windows 11 Enterprise
Version 24H2
OS build 26100.4351

### Repro Steps:

1. Open Visual studio.
2. Open a aspire project and run it. 
3. A new window will open in the chromium edge, TAB to "Resources" tab item and hit ENTER key.
4. Verify that Sort and Resize buttons are not accessible using the keyboard keys.

### Actual Result:
Sort and Resize buttons are not accessible using the keyboard keys
**This issue is observed throughout the application wherever more options or menu items buttons are available.**

### Expected Result:
Sort and Resize buttons should be accessible using the keyboard keys.

### User Impact:
Keyboard and screen reader users will not be able to access the controls.

### Attachment:

https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/c2c16520-acb2-410b-82dd-4d12cc08c3f0

comments.body: This is indeed a valid a11y bug, but the fix will be in fluentui-blazor. Needs more investigation.

Moving to backlog, as we will not consume a new fluentui release before 9.5 dev ends. We need to make sure to include this in planning for next sprint

cc @maddymontaquila

labels.name: external
labels.description: Issues that represent work that's external to this repo.

title: Sort and Resize buttons are not accessible using the keyboard keys: A11y_Aspire Dashboard_Resources_Keyboard.
